title: [MTR] Tramway infrastructure pack
description: Over 30 different catenary consoles, and tram tracks for Minecraft Transit Railway mod
body:
This resource pack adds tram catenary consoles for the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod.

The pack contains more than 30 different catenary poles.
And also, several types of tram tracks.

**[Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) and [Nemo's Transit Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) required!**
